## Gates

- [ ] `npm run gate` (gradle check + walls + hook tests + config guard)
- [ ] `npm run gate:rules` (ast-grep walls: tree scan + rule red/green)
- [ ] `npm run test:hooks`
- [ ] `bash checks/config-guard.sh`
- [ ] `cd gateway && ./gradlew check`
